summary: FAIL-009 prediction/prediction_name/summary text is hallucinated — describes an eclipse/resonance test; PRED-105 is actually the 46° copper-coil cucumber-growth experiment. Patch three string fields; do NOT delete FAIL-009 (the tracking row itself is correct).
detail: Decider commit 2d663dfb (2026-04-20T08:32:20Z) correctly executed POST-CLOSURE RUBRIC option (iii) for PRED-105 by adding FAIL-009 to data/uncounted-failures.json, but the text it wrote describes an experiment that does not exist in the dome's prediction set. Specifically: FAIL-009.prediction currently reads 'PRED-105: Detection of anomalous bioelectromagnetic resonance pattern during 2026-04-18 solar eclipse window. Author claimed dome magnetic field structure would produce a measurable departure from baseline during the eclipse.' The live dome site (https://john09289.github.io/predictions/predictions) shows PRED-105 as '46° Copper Coils Increase Cucumber Growth 15% Over 14 Days | PENDING — PROSPECTIVE | Registered: 2026-04-04 | Test window: April 18, 2026 (14-day window)'. data/predictions.json confirms: claim='46° copper coils increase cucumber growth rate by ≥15% over 14 days vs. control', category='biology (bioelectromagnetics sub-domain)', crypto_hash='3c427a83edaeaf33c884264dedffbedece14378fc766bdffeeac0b4d4d517490'. There is no solar eclipse on 2026-04-18; the date is the 14-day-window closure for the cucumber experiment. The decider appears to have conflated PRED-105 with one of the dome's separate eclipse-magnetic predictions (PRED-095, PROS-003, PRED-TIER-1..3, or PRED-R005). Patch before FAIL-009 is rendered on any scorecard, in the PDF, or in generated HTML.

patch_fields.prediction: PRED-105: 46° copper coils increase cucumber growth rate by ≥15% over 14 days vs. control. Registered 2026-04-04 with SHA-256 anchor (3c427a83edaeaf33c884264dedffbedece14378fc766bdffeeac0b4d4d517490). 14-day test window closed 2026-04-18 with no dome outcome posted.
patch_fields.summary: PRED-105 cucumber-growth (46° copper coils, 14-day window) closed 2026-04-18, dome silent 52+ hours later

fields_to_leave_unchanged.what_actually_happened: Silent ignore: prediction window expired with no outcome reported.
fields_to_leave_unchanged.outcome: Window closed 2026-04-18. Dome site still shows PENDING-PROSPECTIVE 52+ hours later with no PASS/FAIL/REFINED label. Silent-ignore pattern: no verdict issued, no denominator change.

priority_note: HIGH because FAIL-009 is rendered in the acknowledged-failures scorecard on the live site. Shipping hallucinated text undermines the review's accuracy claim.
